title: HAVING: filtrowanie grup
explanation: HAVING działa na grupach, a WHERE na pojedynczych wierszach. Najpierw można użyć WHERE, potem GROUP BY i HAVING.

examples.query: SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 5;
SELECT category_id, AVG(price) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY category_id HAVING AVG(price) > 100;

exercise: Znajdź autorów z więcej niż 3 artykułami w tabeli articles.

validation.expectedSql: SELECT author_id, COUNT(*) AS article_count FROM articles GROUP BY author_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
